name: DeskPilot AI â€“ Automated Support Ticket Routing System

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO $1:name
(company_id, company_name, email, issue_type, issue, intent, priority, assigned_team, sla_hours, sla_deadline, escalation)
VALUES
($2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9, $10, STR_TO_DATE($11, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%fZ'), $12);

SELECT
  $52 AS generated_ticket_id,
  COALESCE($52, LAST_INSERT_ID()) AS ticket_id,
  LAST_INSERT_ID() AS database_row_id,
  $13 AS ticket_table,
  $14 AS company_id,
  $15 AS company_name,
  $16 AS company_slug,
  $17 AS email,
  $18 AS issue_type,
  $19 AS issue_type_label,
  $20 AS issue,
  $21 AS issue_html,
  $22 AS ai_intent,
  $23 AS ai_priority,
  $24 AS ai_priority_label,
  $25 AS user_priority,
  $26 AS user_priority_label,
  $27 AS priority,
  $28 AS priority_label,
  $29 AS priority_reason,
  $30 AS priority_badge_bg,
  $31 AS priority_badge_border,
  $32 AS priority_badge_text,
  $33 AS assigned_team,
  $34 AS support_queue,
  $35 AS sla_hours,
  $36 AS sla_deadline,
  $37 AS sla_deadline_display,
  $38 AS submitted_at,
  $39 AS submitted_at_display,
  $40 AS customer_timezone,
  $41 AS escalation,
  $42 AS escalation_status,
  $43 AS escalation_reason,
  $44 AS classification_summary,
  $45 AS classifier_confidence,
  $46 AS matched_signal,
  $47 AS routing_reason,
  $48 AS impact_statement,
  $49 AS response_plan,
  $50 AS company_routing_note,
  $51 AS automation_summary;

parameters.jsCode:
const routed = $('Routing & SLA Engine').first().json;
const sqlItems = $input.all().map((item) => item.json || {});
const sql = sqlItems.find((item) => item.ticket_id) || sqlItems[sqlItems.length - 1] || {};
const merged = {
  ...routed,
  ...sql,
  ticket_id: sql.generated_ticket_id || sql.ticket_id || routed.ticket_id,
  database_row_id: sql.database_row_id || routed.database_row_id || null,
  email: sql.email || routed.email,
  company_name: sql.company_name || routed.company_name || "Selected Company",
  company_slug: sql.company_slug || routed.company_slug || "selected_company",
  ticket_table: sql.ticket_table || routed.ticket_table || "company_ticket_table",
  issue_type_label: sql.issue_type_label || routed.issue_type_label || "General Inquiry",
  issue: sql.issue || routed.issue,
  issue_html: sql.issue_html || routed.issue_html,
  ai_intent: sql.ai_intent || routed.ai_intent,
  ai_priority: sql.ai_priority || routed.ai_priority,
  ai_priority_label: sql.ai_priority_label || routed.ai_priority_label,
  user_priority: sql.user_priority || routed.user_priority,
  user_priority_label: sql.user_priority_label || routed.user_priority_label,
  priority: sql.priority || routed.priority,
  priority_label: sql.priority_label || routed.priority_label,
  assigned_team: sql.assigned_team || routed.assigned_team,
  support_queue: sql.support_queue || routed.support_queue,
  sla_hours: sql.sla_hours || routed.sla_hours,
  sla_deadline_display: sql.sla_deadline_display || routed.sla_deadline_display,
  submitted_at_display: sql.submitted_at_display || routed.submitted_at_display,
  customer_timezone: sql.customer_timezone || routed.customer_timezone || "Asia/Kolkata",
  escalation_status: sql.escalation_status || routed.escalation_status,
  escalation_reason: sql.escalation_reason || routed.escalation_reason,
  classification_summary: sql.classification_summary || routed.classification_summary,
  classifier_confidence: sql.classifier_confidence || routed.classifier_confidence,
  matched_signal: sql.matched_signal || routed.matched_signal,
  routing_reason: sql.routing_reason || routed.routing_reason,
  impact_statement: sql.impact_statement || routed.impact_statement,
  response_plan: sql.response_plan || routed.response_plan,
  company_routing_note: sql.company_routing_note || routed.company_routing_note,
  automation_summary: sql.automation_summary || routed.automation_summary
};
return [{ json: merged }];

parameters.subject: =DeskPilot Ticket #{{$json.ticket_id}} - {{$json.company_name}} / {{$json.assigned_team}}
parameters.html:
=
DeskPilot AI
Ticket received for {{$json.company_name}}
The ticket was classified, assigned to a company-specific support queue, stored in an isolated MySQL table, and confirmed by email.
Status: Received

Hello,

Your support request for {{$json.company_name}} has been registered. DeskPilot AI detected {{$json.ai_intent}} and routed the ticket to {{$json.support_queue}}.

Ticket ID
#{{$json.ticket_id}}
Company
{{$json.company_name}}
Priority
{{$json.priority_label}}
SLA
{{$json.sla_hours}} hours
Company Storage Isolation
Selected company: {{$json.company_name}}
Company slug: {{$json.company_slug}}
MySQL ticket table: {{$json.ticket_table}}
Isolation rule: {{$json.company_routing_note}}
Ticket Details
Requester Email{{$json.email}}
Issue Category{{$json.issue_type_label}}
Submitted At{{$json.submitted_at_display}} {{$json.customer_timezone}}
Issue Description{{$json.issue_html}}
Current StatusReceived, classified, stored, and assigned
AI Classification
Detected intent: {{$json.ai_intent}}
AI priority: {{$json.ai_priority_label}}
Confidence: {{$json.classifier_confidence}}
Matched signal: {{$json.matched_signal}}
{{$json.classification_summary}}
Routing Decision
Support queue: {{$json.support_queue}}
User priority: {{$json.user_priority_label}}
Final priority: {{$json.priority_label}}
{{$json.routing_reason}}
SLA and Escalation Plan
SLA Deadline
{{$json.sla_deadline_display}}
{{$json.customer_timezone}}
Escalation
{{$json.escalation_status}}
Response Plan
{{$json.response_plan}}
Priority reason: {{$json.priority_reason}}
Escalation reason: {{$json.escalation_reason}}
Customer Impact
{{$json.impact_statement}}
Automation Trail
{{$json.automation_summary}}
What happens next
1. The company-specific queue reviews the ticket details and validates the classification.
2. The assigned team investigates the issue according to the response plan above.
3. If more information is needed, support will reply to this email thread.

Thank you,
DeskPilot AI Support Automation

This confirmation was generated automatically by DeskPilot AI after the ticket passed through Webhook, AI Intent Classifier, Routing & SLA Engine, company-specific MySQL storage, and SMTP delivery.
